# Genomic Variant Agent Notes

This repository is a dependency-free Node web app.

- Start command: `npm start`
- Local URL: `http://localhost:4173`
- Syntax check: `npm run check`
- Main server entry: `server.js`
- Browser UI: `public/index.html`, `public/app.js`, `public/styles.css`
- Local corpus directory: `data/papers`

GitHub Pages cannot host this app by itself because the analysis endpoint runs on a Node backend. Use GitHub Codespaces for running directly from the repository, or deploy the repository to a Node-capable host.
